message:
test(e2e): add comprehensive storage stack integration test (bd-jd39, 5F.2)

Implements a definitive end-to-end test for the entire Phase 5 storage
pipeline, validating that all storage subsystems work together correctly.

Test stages:
1. DDL - Database creation and schema (validates 5A)
2. Write - INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE operations (validates 5B)
3. Read - SELECT and query operations (validates 5C)
4. Transaction - BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK/SAVEPOINT (validates 5D)
5. Persistence - WAL checkpoint, close, reopen (validates 5D + WAL)
6. Integrity - Final integrity check

Features:
- Structured logging with [E2E][stage=X][step=Y] format for traceability
- Per-stage timing and success/failure reporting
- StageReport struct for programmatic result handling
- Macro helpers: e2e_log!, e2e_log_kv! for consistent output
- Tempdir-based isolation (no disk state pollution)

This test serves as the "does the storage stack work?" regression guard
for the storage layer, catching integration issues that per-component
tests might miss.

Note: MVCC concurrent writers (Stage 6) are tested separately in 5E tests.

Related: bd-jd39

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
